---
title: "Gemini — Data Profile (consolidated)"
subtitle: "Aggregated view of the 2 accounts, with stacked bars by account at key points"
source-title: "Gemini (consolidated)"
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| code-summary: "Setup — paths, DuckDB connection, helpers"

import sys
from pathlib import Path

_this = Path.cwd()
_project_root = _this if (_this / "src").exists() else _this.parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(_project_root))

import pandas as pd
import duckdb
from itables import init_notebook_mode
init_notebook_mode(all_interactive=False)

from src.parsers.quarto_helpers import (
    fmt_pct, fmt_int, safe_int, show_df, show_md, plotly_bar,
    has_col, has_view, table_count, setup_notebook,
)

SOURCE_KEY     = "gemini"
SOURCE_TITLE   = "Gemini"
SOURCE_COLOR   = "#4285F4"  # Google blue
MUTED          = "#D1D5DB"
PROCESSED      = _project_root / "data" / "processed" / "Gemini"
TABLES         = ["conversations", "messages", "tool_events", "branches"]
AUX_TABLES     = []
ACCOUNT_FILTER = None  # consolidated — no filter

con = duckdb.connect()
_setup = setup_notebook(con, SOURCE_KEY, PROCESSED, TABLES, AUX_TABLES, ACCOUNT_FILTER)
```

> **About Gemini (consolidated):** aggregates account-1 (`hello.marlonlemes`) +
> account-2 (`marloonlemes`). Raw schema is **positional** (Google batchexecute):
> paths discovered via probe. 8 models detected, 41% of assistant msgs
> with thinking, image generation via lh3.googleusercontent.com → ToolEvent +
> `Message.asset_paths`. Pin discovered via probe (`c[2]` of MaZiqc).
>
> For a single-account view: [`gemini-acc-1.qmd`](gemini-acc-1.html) /
> [`gemini-acc-2.qmd`](gemini-acc-2.html).

{{< include _template.qmd >}}
